title: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
message_html: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition ...
snippet: The new unit arrives amid rapid growth in tokenized assets, with Franklin Templeton's onchain product suite expanding from roughly $768 million to more than $2.5 billion over the past year.

title: Anchorage Digital Introduces Tokenized Deposit Platform for Banks
message_html: Anchorage Digital Introduces Tokenized Deposit Platform for Banks ...
snippet: Anchorage Digital launched Monday (June 22) a new tokenized deposit infrastructure aimed at enabling banks to offer around-the-clock settlement without overhauling their existing core systems, according to a Monday press release.
